# Permanent Note Migration Format

## Target Format

Preserve useful information and normalize each note into: title, core claim, explanation, links, and topic assignment.

## Title Rule

The title must be an assertion-style complete sentence that expresses one idea independently.

## Core Claim

Write one sentence that captures the note's main conclusion.

## Body Handling

Preserve the user's original meaning and make it readable. Do not invent examples.

## Related Links

Add 2-3 related note links and explain the relationship.

## Topic Assignment

Add the matching topic note link from the configured topic notes folder.

## Migration Flow

Read original note -> adjust title -> structure body -> add links -> move to permanent notes folder.
